PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Bret Putnam appeared in person (pro per).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 14, 2021 is admitted to probate. Tam Putnam and Bret Putnam are appointed as the Executor's of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing final inventory and appraisal is set for October 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for June 29, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
